rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Motion To Strike And Demurrer And Motion To Strike Cross-Complainant'S First Amended Cross-Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: 1) The demurrer is SUSTAINED as to the Fraud claim WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. 2) The demurrer is SUSTAINED as to the Professional Negligence claim WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. 3) The demurrer is SUSTAINED as to the Equitable Indemnity claim WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.
